title: totopo.yaml
description: Configuration file for totopo — secure AI dev containers

project_id.description: Unique project identifier. Used for container naming and cache directory. Lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only.

name.description: Human-readable project name (shown in menus and welcome message)

env_file.description: Path to env file relative to totopo.yaml (e.g. '.env'). Injected into container at runtime via --env-file.

shadow_paths.description: Gitignore-style patterns. Matching paths are hidden from the agent — the container gets an empty, isolated copy instead. Patterns without a '/' match at any depth (e.g. 'node_modules' matches all nested node_modules too). Patterns with a '/' match relative to the project root. Supports globs: * (any chars), ? (single char), {a,b} (alternatives).

profiles.description: Named Dockerfile profiles. Each profile defines a dockerfile_hook with raw Dockerfile instructions appended to the base image.

dockerfile_hook.description: Raw Dockerfile instructions appended after the base image layers. Use for installing additional runtimes, tools, or dependencies.
